arts.ttl: Dortmund make light work of 10-man Kiel to secure Champions League spot
arts.sum: Niko Kovač's side ran out 3-0 winners in a vital game for Die Schwarzgelben.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. Holstein Kiel preview: BVB targeting UCL on final day
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will attempt to snatch a Champions League spot on the final day of the season when they play host to relegated Holstein Kiel on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Holstein Kiel - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and Holstein Kiel, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Kovač's feels in-form Dortmund "don't need major changes" for Kiel fixture
arts.sum: Here's what Niko Kovač had to say ahead of Die Schwarzgelben's meeting with Kiel this weekend.
